name: Da Shima Twigim (Korean Fried Kelp)
recipeIngredient: 10 pieces dried black kelp, each approximately 3-inches
recipeInstructions:
1. Wipe each piece of the dried kelp with a damp (not soaking) cloth.
2. Heat the oil in a skillet over moderate heat. Place one piece of kelp at a time into the hot oil, holding it with chopsticks until its color changes to dark green and it becomes crisp.
3. As soon as the kelp is still hot, sprinkle a few grains of sugar on top; the sugar will adhere to the kelp while it remains warm.
4. Remove from heat and enjoy as a side dish or snack food with tea or another beverage.
Serves 4 to 6.
